title: Pod IP Address Exhaustion - Diagnosing and Recovering Cluster Network Capacity
description: In this lab you will diagnose a cluster where new pods are stuck in Pending state even though nodes have available CPU and memory. You will trace the issue to pod IP address exhaustion, identify the contributing factors including leaked allocations and undersized node subnets, and implement cleanup procedures to restore scheduling. The lab teaches you to think about network capacity as a first-class scheduling constraint alongside compute resources.
